  Details:
  Wrote and published Field Signals #7 blog post 'The chain holds' on truesight.me/blog, following up on 'What the angels couldn't name' now that the first real cohort has landed on the credentialing rails. Three angles framed by Gary: witnessed work in an AI-slop internet, the smallest thing that's also enough, and infrastructure permissionless / brand governed. Closes on Ayesha Tabassum at CMS Karachi as today's first attestation with Narowal Public School lined up behind her. Merged to truesight_me_beta and synced through to truesight_me_prod. Live URL after Pages rebuild: https://truesight.me/blog/posts/the-chain-holds.html
